Scaffold từ DQHF — form gốc: frmDinhMucHistory
Nút WinForms gốc: (không)
Nút cần gắn thêm: Xoá (procedure/records.delete) · In (cần print template entity) · Xuất (export)
Proc cần port: TR_DINHMUC_DONGGOI_HISTORY3_GETALL, TR_DINHMUC_GOVAN_HISTORY3_GETALL, TR_DINHMUC_NGUKIM_HISTORY3_GETALL
Entity phụ (lookup/filter cân nhắc thêm): tr_dinhmuc_govan, tr_dinhmuc_ngukim, tr_hehang, tr_khachhang, tr_loaisp, tr_sanpham
